ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "license" TEXT /* Open-source license type */,
  "github_url" TEXT /* URL to the project's GitHub repository */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., developer, maintainer) */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the contributor */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the contributor's avatar */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contribution was made to */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., commit, issue, pull request) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution (e.g., number of commits, number of issues resolved) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contribution */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor in the project (e.g., developer, maintainer) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor joined the project */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor was last active in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contributor in the leaderboard */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the contributor in the leaderboard */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for the leaderboard (e.g., monthly, all-time) */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution for the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new contribution, leaderboard update) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_contributions" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id", "contribution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_contributions" (
  "month" TEXT /* Month the contribution was made */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month", "project_id", "contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "top_contributors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "next_top_contributors" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "contribution_value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_roles" (
  "project_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_comments_contribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_id") REFERENCES contributions ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contribution_comments_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project tag */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tags_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
